name: Fried Feta Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Once the cheese is at room temperature, form into balls of about a tablespoon each.
2. Coat each ball with flour.
3. Dip each ball in the egg/milk batter.
4. Finally, coat each ball with bread crumbs.
5. Refrigerate for about an hour.
6. Fry in hot oil until golden brown.
7. Serve warm.
